title: pterocarpus paniculatus
intro: Pterocarpus paniculatus, also known as the Indian kino tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing protection against infections. In herbal preparations, Pterocarpus paniculatus is typically used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
